segments.text: Launched into the air—that's a tight spot!
segments.original_text: 打ち上げて空中へ 苦しいところです

segments.text: The dair won't make it in time, though
segments.original_text: 空ダは間に合わないが

segments.text: From the rising dair into the tech mixup,
segments.original_text: 上り空ダから受け身の読み合いですけれども

segments.text: Dabuz is just one step short
Up smash—that was a risky hit!
segments.original_text: 上スマッシュ ちょっと危ない当たり方でした

full_text: Launched into the air—that's a tight spot! The dair won't make it in time, though From the rising dair into the tech mixup, Dabuz is just one step short Up smash—that was a risky hit! At 124%... this is Vision Solid out of shield

corrections.original: クーダーは間に合うがない
corrections.corrected: 空ダは間に合わないが
corrections.rule: Whisper mishearing: クーダー→空ダ, word order

corrections.original: 上りクーダーから受け身の読み合いですけれども
corrections.corrected: 上り空ダから受け身の読み合いですけれども
corrections.rule: Whisper mishearing: クーダー→空ダ

corrections.original: ダブル選手が一歩手前
